Primary Endpoint(s).value: Confirmed response defined as a composite of radiological objective response (RECIST 1.1), a decrease in prostate-specific antigen (PSA) of 50% or more (PSA50) from baseline, or conversion of circulating tumour cell count (from ≥5 cells per 7.5 mL blood at baseline to <5 cells per 7.5 mL blood).
